history.content: Hey Claw - every day at 8:05pm EST- Can you send me a message giving me a summary of news events that happened today?
Got it—your daily news-summary job is currently set for 7:52 PM ET. Should I update it to run at 8:05 PM ET instead?
yea go ahead and rename it properly too
Job updated—your daily news-summary is now scheduled for 8:05 PM ET as “Daily 8:05 PM ET news summary.”
